name: slide-out
title: SlideOut
description: A direction-parameterized translate-and-fade exit — text drifts up, down, left, or right while opacity fades to 0 on the house spring. The mirror of SlideIn. No overshoot, calm 16px travel.
pickWhen: the line should exit toward a direction. The mirror of SlideIn. Not for general "this beat is done."
